Container.Name: nornicdb-hermes-memory-cpu
Container.Overview: NornicDB is a Neo4j-compatible graph + vector + temporal database and the best long-term memory store for the Hermes agent. This CPU-only build bundles BGE-M3 embeddings (no GPU required) and gives the Hermes agent sub-millisecond HNSW vector search, native graph traversal, and hybrid (vector + BM25) retrieval in one engine. Through Bolt/Cypher and Qdrant-compatible gRPC, the Hermes agent can store, auto-link, and recall memories without a separate vector store. Managed embeddings, auto-relationships, MVCC temporal/as-of reads, and policy-based memory decay let the Hermes agent build a persistent, self-organizing knowledge graph that forgets noise and promotes durable facts — ideal Graph-RAG memory for the Hermes agent.
Container.Description:
## NornicDB (CPU)
Graph, vector, and temporal database — Bolt/Cypher compatible with Neo4j drivers. **No GPU required.**
### Image variants Pick a **version/branch** when adding the container:
| Branch | When to use | |--------|-------------| | **cpu-bge** | Default — BGE-M3 bundled (~586 MB). Web UI on port 7474 | | **cpu-headless** | API-only, no web UI (~500 MB). Set `NORNICDB_HEADLESS=true` |
### After install 1. WebUI: port **7474** (cpu-bge only) 2. Bolt: `bolt://YOUR_UNRAID_IP:7687` 3. Health: `http://YOUR_UNRAID_IP:7474/health` 4. **Connection guide (Hermes / Python / Node.js):** https://github.com/RapalS/UNRAID_DOCKER_TEMPLATES/blob/main/nornicdb-unraid-docker-eli5-guide.md
**Embeddings:** Do **not** bind-mount an empty folder to `/app/models` — that hides the bundled `bge-m3` model.
### Heimdall AI assistant (optional) Enable natural-language chat in the admin UI (Bifrost). Set `NORNICDB_HEIMDALL_ENABLED=true`, then pick a provider: - **local** — bundled GGUF model (default on *-heimdall images) - **ollama** — set `NORNICDB_HEIMDALL_PROVIDER=ollama` and `NORNICDB_HEIMDALL_API_URL` (e.g. `http://YOUR_OLLAMA_IP:11434`) - **openai** — set `NORNICDB_HEIMDALL_PROVIDER=openai` and `NORNICDB_HEIMDALL_API_KEY`
Full guide: https://github.com/orneryd/NornicDB/blob/main/docs/user-guides/heimdall-ai-assistant.md
For NVIDIA or Vulkan GPU on AMD64, use **nornicdb-hermes-memory-gpu** instead. For Apple Silicon, use **nornicdb-hermes-memory-apple-silicon**.
Container.Requires: Docker Hub pull. Recommend 2 GB+ RAM. No GPU.

Branch.TagDescription: CPU + BGE-M3 embeddings (~586 MB). Recommended default.
CPU API-only, no web UI (~500 MB).

Config.Name: HTTP Admin UI
Config.Description: HTTP API and web admin UI.

Config.Name: Data directory env
Config.Description: Must match mounted /data path inside container.

Config.Name: Disable authentication
Config.Description: true = no auth (default). Set false before exposing to untrusted networks.

Config.Name: Headless mode
Config.Description: Disable web UI. Use with cpu-headless branch.

Config.Name: Heimdall AI assistant
Config.Description: Enable Bifrost AI chat in admin UI (helmet icon). See upstream Heimdall guide.

Config.Name: Heimdall API URL
Config.Description: Ollama: http://host:11434. OpenAI: https://api.openai.com. Empty = provider default.

Config.Name: Heimdall model
Config.Description: GGUF name (no .gguf), Ollama model, or OpenAI model name.

Config.Name: Embedding provider
Config.Description: Embedding backend. local works with bge images.
